executives.name: Jen-Hsun Huang
executives.background: Jen-Hsun Huang co-founded NVIDIA in 1993 and has served as President, Chief Executive Officer and a member of the Board of Directors since that time. From 1985 to 1993, Mr. Huang was employed at LSI Logic Corporation, a computer chip manufacturer, in a variety of positions, most recently as Director of Coreware, the business unit responsible for LSI's system-on-a-chip strategy. From 1983 to 1985, Mr. Huang was a microprocessor designer at Advanced Micro Devices, Inc., a semiconductor company. Mr. Huang holds a B.S.E.E. degree from Oregon State University and an M.S.E.E. degree from Stanford University.

tenure_dates.title: Co-founder, President, Chief Executive Officer, and Member of the Board of Directors

executives.name: Colette Kress
executives.background: Colette M. Kress joined NVIDIA in 2013 as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer. Prior to NVIDIA, Ms. Kress served as Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of the Business Software and Services division of Cisco Systems, Inc. from 2010 to 2013. She also spent 13 years at Microsoft Corporation in various finance roles, including Chief Financial Officer of the Server and Tools division. Ms. Kress holds a B.S. degree in Finance from the University of Arizona and an M.B.A. degree from the University of Washington.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: Jay Puri
executives.background: Jay Puri joined NVIDIA in 2005 and serves as Executive Vice President, Worldwide Field Operations. Prior to NVIDIA, Mr. Puri spent 22 years at Sun Microsystems, Inc., where he held various senior sales, marketing, and general management positions. Mr. Puri holds a B.S. degree in Electrical Engineering from the University of Minnesota, an M.S. degree in Electrical Engineering from the California Institute of Technology, and an M.B.A. degree from Harvard Business School.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President, Worldwide Field Operations
Executive Vice President, Worldwide Field Operations

executives.name: Debora Shoquist
executives.background: Debora Shoquist joined NVIDIA in 2007 and serves as Executive Vice President, Operations. Prior to NVIDIA, Ms. Shoquist served as Executive Vice President of Operations at JDS Uniphase Corp. and Senior Vice President of Operations at Coherent, Inc. She also spent 11 years at Quantum Corp. and 10 years at Hewlett-Packard Company in various engineering and manufacturing management roles. Ms. Shoquist holds a B.S. degree in Electrical Engineering from Kansas State University and a B.S. degree in Biology from Santa Clara University.

executives.name: Timothy Teter
executives.background: Timothy S. Teter joined NVIDIA in 2017 as Executive Vice President, General Counsel and Secretary. Prior to NVIDIA, Mr. Teter was a partner at the law firm of Cooley LLP, where he practiced for two decades and served as outside counsel to NVIDIA. Mr. Teter holds a B.S. degree in Mechanical Engineering from the University of California, Davis and a J.D. degree from Stanford Law School.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President, General Counsel and Secretary
Executive Vice President, General Counsel and Secretary

executives.name: Aarti Shah
executives.background: Former Senior Vice President and Chief Information and Digital Officer of Eli Lilly and Company.

executives.name: Dawn Hudson
executives.background: Former Chief Marketing Officer of the National Football League and former President and CEO of Pepsi-Cola North America.

executives.name: Harvey Jones
executives.background: Managing Partner of Square Wave Ventures and co-founder of Daisy Systems Corporation.

executives.name: John Dabiri
executives.background: Professor of Aeronautics and Mechanical Engineering at the California Institute of Technology.

tenure_dates.title: Director (Member of the Board of Directors)

executives.name: Mark Perry
executives.background: Former President and CEO of Aerogen, Inc. and former executive at Gilead Sciences, Inc.

tenure_dates.title: Director (Member of the Board of Directors)

executives.name: Melissa Lora
executives.background: Former President of Taco Bell International and former CFO of Taco Bell Corp.

executives.name: Michael McCaffery
executives.background: Chairman of Makena Capital Management and former President and CEO of Stanford Management Company.

executives.name: Persis Drell
executives.background: Former Provost of Stanford University and former Director of the SLAC National Accelerator Laboratory.

tenure_dates.title: Member of the Board of Directors

executives.name: Rene Haas
executives.background: Rene Haas has served as our Chief Executive Officer and a member of our board of directors since February 2022. Prior to being appointed Chief Executive Officer, Mr. Haas served as President of our IP Product Groups from January 2017. Mr. Haas joined Arm in 2013 as Vice President of Strategic Alliances and two years later was appointed to the Executive Committee as Chief Commercial Officer. Before joining Arm, Mr. Haas held several senior management roles at NVIDIA and served as Vice President and General Manager of computing products at Scintera Networks and Tensilica.

tenure_dates.title: Vice President and General Manager of Computing Products Business Unit

executives.name: Robert Burgess
executives.background: Former Chairman and CEO of Macromedia, Inc. and former executive at Silicon Graphics, Inc.

executives.name: Ross Jatou
executives.background: Ross Jatou has served as our Executive Vice President and General Manager, Intelligent Sensing Group since October 2020. He joined the Company in 2015 and has held various leadership roles in the automotive and industrial sensing business.
